title: Bosbit Matarcher
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}}

|homeworld=[[Delemede/Legends|Delemede]]<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|48|life/13321_2.html|225-year Old Man's Secret? Time Dilation}}</ref>
|birth=c. [[247 BBY/Legends|247 BBY]]<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|48|life/13321_2.html|225-year Old Man's Secret? Time Dilation}} is set on the date [[Great ReSynchronization|13:3:21]], which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]]. The article establishes that Bosbit Matarcher was 225 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of its publication, meaning he must have been [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] around [[247 BBY/Legends|247 BBY]]. "225-year Old Man's Secret? Time Dilation" also states that Matarcher traveled in his [[Delemedian starhopper]] 200 years before its release, equatng to [[222 BBY/Legends|222 BBY]].</ref>

{{Quote|I got what I thought was a deal on this ship.|Bosbit Matarcher, on his faulty Delemedian starhopper|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Bosbit Matarcher''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from the astronomical object [[Delemede/Legends|Delemede]] who, after a [[relativistic shield]] malfunction during a brief [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump aboard a [[Delemedian starhopper]] in [[222 BBY/Legends|222 BBY]], found himself two hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]] in the [[Time travel/Legends|future]]. The unusual journey brought Matarcher brief fame, netting him a minor [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] interview. However, Matacher was actually delighted at the mishap—when he had left in 222 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], Delemede was dilapidated, but by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of his return in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the planet was flourishing.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I engaged the jump drive for a trip in outsystem. It took about two hours. When I got out, it was 200 years later.|Bosbit Matarcher|<ref name="HNN" />}}
Bosbit Matarcher was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Homeworld/Legends|from]]<ref name="HNN" /> the astronomical object<ref name="On Both Their Houses">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Diplomacy|On Both Their Houses}}</ref> [[Delemede/Legends|Delemede]] who was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]]<ref name="HNN" /> around [[247 BBY/Legends|247 BBY]].<ref name="Date" /> When he was twenty-five [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old<ref name="HNN" /> in [[222 BBY/Legends|222 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> Matarcher bought a [[Delemedian starhopper]], believing he had gotten a great deal for the [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. However, when he engaged the [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] to take a quick jump [[Delemede system/Legends|outsystem]], the [[relativistic shield]] on the starhopper—which was supposed to protect Matarcher from the strange bends in [[Time/Legends|time]] and [[Realspace/Legends|space]] associated with traveling at such hypervelocity—malfunctioned. The journey to leave the Delemede [[Star system/Legends|system]] took a mere two [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] for Matarcher and he eventually exited [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. However, he found that to the outside [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], 200 years had passed,<ref name="HNN" /> making it [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> and resulting in him being 225 standard years old.<ref name="HNN" />

A brief interview with Matarcher was published in an edition of [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition]] about his unique experience. He expressed his plans to return to his home—this time by normal transit—while also expressing excitement in returning to a thriving Delemede that had been run-down when he had departed.<ref name="HNN" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Well, truth to tell, when I left, home was pretty shoddy and run down, but now Delemede is a thriving place. I can't wait to get back, but this time I'll fly transit.|Bosbit Matarcher|<ref name="HNN" />}}
After [[Time travel/Legends|traveling]] 200 years through time, he was happy that the malfunction had occurred since he could now return to Delemede, which was thriving when it had not been in the past. Matarcher had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], gray [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and light skin.<ref name="HNN" />

==Equipment==
Matarcher wore yellow-and-black colored [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]].<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bosbit Matarcher was first mentioned in "225-year Old Man's Secret? Time Dilation," an article<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 48|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #48]] on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[March 21]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN48 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6128630|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=PrinceXizor|date=2002-03-21|time=3:24 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> According to Hidalgo, his creation was made as a reference to "134-Year-Old Man Attributes Longevity To Typographical Error," an article published in the real-world satirical publication ''[[Wikipedia:The_Onion|The Onion]]''.<ref name="Hidalgo tweet">{{Twitter|pabl0hidalgo|status/1724844794856546805|[[Pablo Hidalgo]]|quote=That HNN story was my nod to this:|archiveurl=https://archive.li/zt94X}}</ref>
